install_fields.label: Personal Access Token
install_fields.description: Airtable Personal Access Token (starts with 'pat'). Create at airtable.com/create/tokens with data.records:read and schema.bases:read scopes.

install_fields.label: Default Base ID (optional)
install_fields.description: Default Airtable Base ID to sync from (e.g. appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX). Found in the URL when viewing a base. Leave blank to sync all accessible bases.
